narrative:
Beavercreek 021 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,067 registered voters, with 66.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
